--- title: Activity Diagram - ZKP Tooling Comparison config: theme: base --- %% UML Activity (FinTech_TransactionQueue) for ZKP tooling comparison workflow. stateDiagram-v2 state "Define ZKP requirements
(FinTech_PaymentGateway)" as Define state "Shortlist ZKP libraries" as Shortlist state "Evaluate integration fit
(FinTech_PaymentGateway)" as Fit state "Run benchmarks
(FinTech_TransactionQueue)" as Bench state "Select candidate for PoC" as Select state "Reject or defer candidate" as Reject state "Document decision and risks" as Document [FinTech_LedgerService] --> Define Define --> Shortlist Shortlist --> Fit: fits platform constraints Shortlist --> Reject: lacks required support Fit --> Bench Bench --> Select: meets PoC targets Bench --> Shortlist: fails targets Reject --> Shortlist Select --> Document Document --> [FinTech_LedgerService]
repo_description: The QuantumZero repository hosts the project’s public-facing static website, delivered through Static Pages. This site provides high-level information about the platform, including architectural overv

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为FinTech_PaymentGateway设计一个ZKP工具选型的工作流图。核心是从需求定义到最终决策的完整流程，起点应该是FinTech_LedgerService触发整个活动。
明白。那第一步是"Define ZKP requirements"节点，由LedgerService触发。接下来是Shortlist阶段筛选候选库。我想确认一下：评估阶段是否需要区分平台适配性和性能测试两个层次？
对，需要分层。先评估integration fit，通过后再进入benchmarks。FinTech_TransactionQueue会承载性能测试环节。如果fit阶段就不通过，直接走Reject分支。
好的，我添加了Fit节点和两条分支：Shortlist到Fit标注"fits platform constraints"，Shortlist到Reject标注"lacks required support"。继续补充Bench之后的分支逻辑？
Bench之后要分叉：达到PoC目标的进入Select，没达到的返回Shortlist重新评估其他候选。另外Reject的候选如果后续有更新，也应该能回流到Shortlist。
已添加：Bench到Select标注"meets PoC targets"，Bench到Shortlist标注"fails targets"，以及Reject到Shortlist的回流线。最后Select之后是Document决策节点吗？
是的，Select之后进入Document节点记录决策和风险，然后整个活动闭环回到FinTech_LedgerService。标题定为"Activity Diagram - ZKP Tooling Comparison"。
完成。整个UML活动图从FinTech_LedgerService启动，经过Define、Shortlist、Fit、Bench、Select到Document，各分支条件已标注清楚，最终回到LedgerService形成闭环。
